case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS LONDON CAROLYN A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $707.76 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON CAROLYN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONDON CAROLYN A. $707.76 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $779.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $19.87 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON CAROLYN A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON CAROLYN A.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON CAROLYN A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON CAROLYN A.
